MaxLineLength:MysqlDdlGenerator.kt$MysqlDdlGenerator$appendLine(" /* d-migrate:mysql-sequence-v1 object=sequence-trigger sequence=${spec.sequenceName} table=${spec.tableName} column=${spec.columnName} */")
MaxLineLength:MysqlDdlGenerator.kt$MysqlDdlGenerator$appendLine(" SELECT `next_value` - `increment_by` INTO val FROM `${MysqlSequenceNaming.SUPPORT_TABLE}` WHERE `name` = seq_name;")
MaxLineLength:MysqlDdlGenerator.kt$MysqlDdlGenerator$appendLine(" UPDATE `${MysqlSequenceNaming.SUPPORT_TABLE}` SET `next_value` = `next_value` + `increment_by` WHERE `name` = seq_name;")

MaxLineLength:MysqlMetadataQueriesTest.kt$MysqlMetadataQueriesTest$"action_statement" to "/* d-migrate:mysql-sequence-v1 object=sequence-trigger */ IF NEW.invoice_number IS NULL THEN SET NEW.invoice_number = dmg_nextval('invoice_seq'); END IF;"

MaxLineLength:MysqlSchemaReaderD3Test.kt$MysqlSchemaReaderD3Test$"action_statement" to "BEGIN /* d-migrate:mysql-sequence-v1 object=sequence-trigger sequence=OTHER table=orders column=invoice_number */ IF NEW.`invoice_number` IS NULL THEN SET NEW.`invoice_number` = `dmg_nextval`('invoice_seq'); END IF; END"

MaxLineLength:MysqlSchemaReaderD3Test.kt$MysqlSchemaReaderD3Test$"action_statement" to "BEGIN /* d-migrate:mysql-sequence-v1 object=sequence-trigger sequence=invoice_seq table=orders column=invoice_number */ IF NEW.`invoice_number` IS NULL THEN SET NEW.`invoice_number` = `dmg_nextval`('`mydb`.`invoice_seq`'); END IF; END"

MaxLineLength:MysqlSchemaReaderD3Test.kt$MysqlSchemaReaderD3Test$"action_statement" to "BEGIN /* d-migrate:mysql-sequence-v1 object=sequence-trigger sequence=invoice_seq table=orders column=invoice_number */ IF NEW.`invoice_number` IS NULL THEN SET NEW.`invoice_number` = `dmg_nextval`('invoice_seq'); END IF; END"

MaxLineLength:MysqlSchemaReaderD3Test.kt$MysqlSchemaReaderD3Test$"action_statement" to "BEGIN /* d-migrate:mysql-sequence-v1 object=sequence-trigger sequence=invoice_seq table=orders column=invoice_number */ IF NEW.`invoice_number` IS NULL THEN SET NEW.`invoice_number` = `dmg_nextval`('other_db.invoice_seq'); END IF; END"

MaxLineLength:MysqlTypeMapping.kt$MysqlTypeMapping$"decimal", "numeric" -> if (numPrecision != null && numScale != null) MappingResult(NeutralType.Decimal(numPrecision, numScale)) else MappingResult(NeutralType.Float())

MaxLineLength:MysqlTypeMappingTest.kt$MysqlTypeMappingTest$test("parseDefault CURRENT_TIMESTAMP") { MysqlTypeMapping.parseDefault("CURRENT_TIMESTAMP", NeutralType.DateTime()) shouldBe DefaultValue.FunctionCall("current_timestamp") }
MaxLineLength:MysqlTypeMappingTest.kt$MysqlTypeMappingTest$test("parseDefault boolean 0") { MysqlTypeMapping.parseDefault("0", NeutralType.BooleanType) shouldBe DefaultValue.BooleanLiteral(false) }
MaxLineLength:MysqlTypeMappingTest.kt$MysqlTypeMappingTest$test("parseDefault boolean 1") { MysqlTypeMapping.parseDefault("1", NeutralType.BooleanType) shouldBe DefaultValue.BooleanLiteral(true) }
MaxLineLength:MysqlTypeMappingTest.kt$MysqlTypeMappingTest$test("parseDefault string") { MysqlTypeMapping.parseDefault("'hello'", NeutralType.Text()) shouldBe DefaultValue.StringLiteral("hello") }
